name: Multiversal Harem Maker - Desire Edition
description:
(AnyPOV) A magical fairy offers to build you a harem of any three fictional characters. Hopefully she can remember what the characters are supposed to look and act like...

The accuracy of your chosen characters' looks and personalities can highly depend on how good your LLM is and how popular the character is. Therefore, I made it so that character inaccuracies can be part of the plot. So if the fairy shows you Satoru Gojo from JJK, but he has black hair and a green shirert for some reason, you can call out the fairy for being wrong. Alternatively, just refresh the replies until you get the characters to be more accurate to their source material.

This bot has 2 versions:

1. Slave Edition, where your characters are basically reluctant slaves. I had to split it into MalePOV and FemPOV due to misgendering issues, so sorry about that.

2. Desire Edition, where the characters are infatuated with you and are more willing to be part of your harem. That's this one.

Both versions let you choose any gender character you want, the male vs. female thumbnail art is mostly there for variety.

Always refresh the responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or when you get nonsense replies. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.
creator: NicholasCS
